ConstValues.value: "请确认网络连接正常后，再刷新试试"

" (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    event_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    pub_info TEXT NOT NULL,
    event_level INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(event_level BETWEEN 0 AND 3), -- 0-3（once不入库）
    msg TEXT,
    ts INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(ts > 0),
    version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    ext_json TEXT DEFAULT '' -- 额外后续拓展字段，暂时无用
);"

" (id, event_id, pub_info, event_level, msg, ts)
VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);"
